title: Werauhia bi-beatricis
taxonomy: Werauhia bi-beatricis is classified within the family of Bromeliaceae, a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as air plants or pineapples. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, and Werauhia bi-beatricis belongs to the subfamily Tillandsioideae. At the genus level, Werauhia bi-beatricis is a member of the genus Werauhia, which is a group of epiphytic plants native to the Americas. The species Werauhia bi-beatricis is a specific type of plant within this genus, characterized by its unique characteristics and features. This classification is based on various taxonomic studies and is subject to ongoing research and refinement.
